div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm mb-4 rounded-3 overflow-hidden

span.class: badge bg-white text-caqa-primary mb-2 shadow-sm rounded-pill px-3 py-1

span.t-attf-class: badge #{'bg-warning text-dark' if application.state in ['draft', 'in_progress'] else 'bg-success'} shadow-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-pill fs-6 fw-bold

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between small fw-bold text-muted mb-2
d-flex justify-content-between small fw-bold text-muted mb-2
d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-end gap-3 align-items-center pt-4 mt-4 border-top border-light
me-auto text-muted small fw-bold bg-light px-3 py-2 rounded-3 border

t.div: Application is locked for review. Only Evidences/Forms are active.

div.class: me-auto text-warning small fw-bold bg-light px-3 py-2 rounded-3 border

t.div: Draft mode. Start accreditation to generate required forms.

button.class: btn btn-success rounded-pill px-4 fw-bold shadow-sm
button.onclick: return confirm('Start accreditation? This locks data and generates the evaluation structure.')

button.class: btn btn-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-5 py-2 fw-bold shadow-sm
btn text-white rounded-pill px-4 fw-bold shadow-sm

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 mb-4 overflow-hidden

button.class: nav-link active fw-bold text-caqa-primary py-3 border-0 border-bottom border-caqa-primary border-3 bg-light
nav-link fw-bold text-muted py-3 border-0 border-bottom border-transparent border-3
nav-link fw-bold text-muted py-3 border-0 border-bottom border-transparent border-3
nav-link fw-bold text-muted py-3 border-0 border-bottom border-transparent border-3
nav-link fw-bold text-danger py-3 border-0 border-bottom border-transparent border-3
nav-link fw-bold text-muted py-3 border-0 border-bottom border-transparent border-3

div.class: tab-content bg-white border border-top-0 p-4 mb-5 shadow-sm

t.div: Standard structure has not been generated for this application yet.

div.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap

t.div: No Self Assessment Reports (SAR) have been initialized.

div.div: Required Evidences: The list below automatically identifies all standard requirements needed for compliance. Click on each requirement to upload the corresponding documents.

t.div: No evidence requests found. They are generated alongside the indicators structural map.

div.p: This mandatory evaluation form must be completed as part of your accreditation profile.

a.class: btn btn-primary btn-sm px-3 shadow-sm rounded-pill

t.div: No evaluation forms are required for this application type.

div.class: alert alert-warning border-0 shadow-sm d-flex align-items-center mb-4 px-4 py-3 rounded-3

div.p: Please review and submit your institution's response to the items below. Open deficiencies must be resolved before final approval.

div.t-attf-class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden transition
div.t-attf-style: border-left: 5px solid #{'#10b981' if def_rec.state in ['resolved','closed'] else '#1A365D' if def_rec.state == 'responded' else '#ef4444'} !important;

div.class: card-header bg-white border-bottom-0 pt-4 px-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start flex-wrap

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-light border text-uppercase mb-2 shadow-sm #{'border-danger text-danger' if def_rec.severity == 'critical' else 'border-warning text-warning' if def_rec.severity == 'high' else 'border-info text-info' if def_rec.severity == 'medium' else 'border-secondary text-secondary'}
badge shadow-sm rounded-pill px-3 py-2 #{'bg-success' if def_rec.state in ['resolved','closed'] else 'bg-caqa-primary' if def_rec.state == 'responded' else 'bg-danger'}

div.class: bg-light border rounded-3 p-4 mb-4 mt-3

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold text-caqa-primary rounded-pill shadow-sm

div.label: Provide Correction Strategy *

textarea.name: institution_response
textarea.placeholder: Describe the corrective actions taken or provide missing evidence context...

div.div: Be thorough. Clearly outline the actions your institution has taken to resolve this deficiency.

t.div: Current file: (Uploading a new file will replace this)

button.class: btn btn-caqa-primary px-4 fw-bold shadow-sm w-100

div.class: alert alert-success border-0 mb-0 px-4 py-3 rounded-3 shadow-sm d-flex align-items-center

i.class: fa fa-check-circle fa-2x text-success opacity-75 me-3

div.p: This item has been closed by the evaluators. No further action is necessary.

div.class: text-center py-5 bg-white border rounded-3 shadow-sm my-4

i.class: fa fa-check-circle-o fa-4x text-success opacity-50 mb-3

div.p: Your application currently meets all standards without any outstanding deficiencies.

div.class: alert border-0 shadow-sm d-flex align-items-center mb-4 px-4 py-3 rounded-3

div.p: These are the official evaluator reviews submitted for your application. Reviews include scores, summaries, notes, and formal recommendations.

div.class: card-header p-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start flex-wrap

span.class: badge bg-white text-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-3 py-1 mb-2 shadow-sm small fw-bold text-uppercase

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 shadow-sm #{'bg-success' if rev.state == 'closed' else 'bg-warning text-dark' if rev.state == 'submitted' else 'bg-info text-dark'}

div.t-attf-class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden h-100
div.t-attf-style: border-left: 4px solid #{'#10b981' if rec.recommendation == 'approve' else '#ef4444' if rec.recommendation == 'reject' else '#B87C19'} !important;

i.t-attf-class: fa fa-2x me-3 #{'fa-check-circle text-success' if rec.recommendation == 'approve' else 'fa-times-circle text-danger' if rec.recommendation == 'reject' else 'fa-exclamation-circle'}

small.t-attf-class: badge mt-1 rounded-pill #{'bg-success' if rec.state == 'accepted' else 'bg-secondary'}

div.t-attf-style: border-left: 4px solid #{'#ef4444' if note.severity == 'critical' else '#f59e0b' if note.severity == 'high' else '#3b82f6' if note.severity == 'medium' else '#6b7280'} !important;

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-light border text-uppercase small #{'border-danger text-danger' if note.severity == 'critical' else 'border-warning text-warning' if note.severity == 'high' else 'border-info text-info' if note.severity == 'medium' else 'border-secondary text-secondary'}
badge rounded-pill #{'bg-success' if note.state in ['accepted','closed'] else 'bg-caqa-primary' if note.state == 'responded' else 'bg-secondary'}

div.class: text-center py-5 bg-white border rounded-3 shadow-sm my-4
div.p: Evaluator reviews will appear here once the assessment panel has submitted their findings.

div.class: sticky-top bg-white border-bottom shadow-sm px-4 py-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-5

a.class: btn btn-light rounded-pill fw-bold text-secondary shadow-sm border px-3

div.class: alert alert-success border-0 rounded-3 shadow-sm px-4 py-3 mb-5 d-flex align-items-center

i.class: fa fa-lock fa-2x me-3 text-success opacity-50

div.p: This evaluation form has been permanently submitted and is locked from further edits by the institution.

div.class: p-3 bg-white border rounded text-dark fw-bold

t.t-value: opt_raw.split(',') if ',' in opt_raw else opt_raw.split()

div.class: p-3 bg-white border rounded fw-bold text-dark

t.p: Current file: (Uploading a new file will replace it)

div.class: p-3 bg-white border rounded text-dark fst-italic
